specific_question: Did Elexion Automotive establish a battery recycling partnership with a North American recycling facility?
answer: Yes, in October 2024, Elexion Automotive established an extensive battery recycling partnership with a North American recycling facility based in Nevada to process dying vehicle batteries and recover lithium, cobalt, and nickel for reuse in new battery production.
